Package jpa.dto.concert

  • Constructor Details

    • Overview

      public Overview(Integer totalConcerts, Integer publishedConcerts, Integer pendingConcerts, Integer rejectedConcerts, Integer upcomingConcerts, Integer pastConcerts, Integer totalTicketQuantity, Integer totalTicketSold, Integer totalTicketAvailable, BigDecimal globalSellThroughRatePct, BigDecimal averageConcertSellThroughRatePct, BigDecimal grossRevenue, BigDecimal averageTicketPrice, BigDecimal averageRevenuePerConcert)
      Creates an instance of a Overview record class.
      Parameters:
      totalConcerts - the value for the totalConcerts record component
      publishedConcerts - the value for the publishedConcerts record component
      pendingConcerts - the value for the pendingConcerts record component
      rejectedConcerts - the value for the rejectedConcerts record component
      upcomingConcerts - the value for the upcomingConcerts record component

      grossRevenue - the value for the grossRevenue record component
      averageTicketPrice - the value for the averageTicketPrice record component
      averageRevenuePerConcert - the value for the averageRevenuePerConcert record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
